title: Endostemon camporum
taxonomy: Endostemon camporum belongs to the family Lamiaceae. It is a species within the genus Endostemon. The classification of Endostemon camporum places it as an annual shrub native to South Africa. This classification positions it as part of the larger plant kingdom, specifically in the division Magnoliophyta. The Lamiaceae family is commonly referred to as the mint family due to its numerous members and characteristic scented leaves.
